mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_preference (user_id, allergens, preferred_categories, spicy_level, taste, budget_min, budget_max) VALUES (#{userId}, #{allergens}, #{preferredCategories}, #{spicyLevel}, #{taste}, #{budgetMin}, #{budgetMax}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE allergens = #{allergens}, preferred_categories = #{preferredCategories}, spicy_level = #{spicyLevel}, taste = #{taste}, budget_min = #{budgetMin}, budget_max = #{budgetMax}
